name: Pan Seared Peppered Swordfish with Red Onion Citrus Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 (8 ounce) swordfish steaks, about 1 inch thick
1 orange, peeled and cut into slices
1/2 red onion, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the swordfish steaks with fresh ground pepper and let sit for 5 minutes.
2. In a medium bowl, combine orange slices, thinly sliced red onion, chopped cilantro, and 3 tablespoons of olive oil.
3. Heat a heavy skillet over medium-high heat and add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil.
4. Add the swordfish steaks to the skillet and cook on either side until well browned, about 3 minutes per side.
